name: Javon Wright
bio: American welterweight known for long hair and a relentless, high-output fighting style. Fights out of Long Beach, California by way of St. Louis, Missouri under coach Adam Flowers. Brings a diverse combat background with a 6-6 MMA record, 1-0 kickboxing record, and 1-5 pro boxing record. Notable BKB wins over Carlos Guerra, Walter Saravia, and Kylle McMillan.
